Title: Prime Guilt™ Tote Bag
Description: Hand-sewn by someone who definitely read the fulfillment center reviews. Holds up to 40 lbs of impulse purchases. Reusable — morally ambiguous.

Title: Same-Day Delivery (Next Week)
Description: Promised by 8pm. Arrived Thursday. Box is wet. We are looking into it. Thank you for your patience and continued Prime membership.

Title: Five-Star Review (Blank)
Description: Pre-filled with enthusiasm. Just add product name. Verified purchase not included. Great seller A++++++.

Title: Fulfillment (Emotional)
Description: Ships from a warehouse in Nevada. Arrives partially assembled. May contain packing peanuts where satisfaction was supposed to go.

Title: Competitive Pricing (Trophy)
Description: Awarded to the lowest bidder. Engraved with "Race to the Bottom, 1st Place." Suitable for framing or quarterly business reviews.

Title: Subscription Cancellation Confirmation
Description: A physical letter confirming your cancellation. Followed by 11 more letters asking if you're sure. We're not angry. Just disappointed.

Title: Organic Air (Locally Sourced)
Description: Hand-harvested within 200 miles of your zip code. No artificial oxygen. Certified by an organization we made up. Pairs well with the Artisanal Void.

Title: Frequently Bought Together (Just the Label)
Description: Attach to anything. Creates the illusion of a curated bundle. Social proof not included but implied. Works on people at parties too.

Title: Customers Also Viewed (Framed Print)
Description: A museum-quality print of six unrelated products the algorithm thinks you want. One is a hat. You did not search for a hat. The hat knows.

Title: Limited Time Deal (No Expiry)
Description: Was $199.99. Now $199.97. Lightning deal. Thunder deal. Mild drizzle deal. Offer valid until further notice or the heat death of the universe.

Title: Add to Wishlist (Physical Wishlist)
Description: A laminated card you hand to people. They nod. Nothing happens. Updated annually. Compatible with all gift-giving occasions and selective hearing.

Title: Packing Peanuts (Premium Reserve)
Description: Aged in a fulfillment center since Q3. Notes of styrofoam, static, and someone else's order. Sold by the cubic foot. Not edible. We checked.

Title: Generic White Label T-Shirt
Description: Manufactured somewhere. Materials: fabric. Fit: regular. Color: your best guess. Sold by 47 different storefronts at slightly different prices. This one is the real one.

Title: Warehouse Ambient Noise (12hr USB)
Description: Scan guns. Conveyor belts. A forklift reversing. The sound of commerce. Sleep to it. Focus to it. Reckon with it.

Title: Two-Day Shipping Hat
Description: Arrives in two days. The hat itself says "Two-Day Shipping." That's the whole bit. Adjustable. One size fits most expectations.

Title: Sold by Bamazon (Fulfilled by Someone Else)
Description: We listed it. Somebody else touched it. A third party shipped it. You bought it. Together, we are commerce. Returns accepted by nobody in particular.

Title: Supplement for Hustle (Placebo)
Description: 30 capsules of inert ambition. Take 2 daily with a podcast and a cold plunge you'll try once. Not FDA reviewed. Neither is the hustle.

Title: Box Within a Box (Unboxing Experience)
Description: 7 nested boxes. The innermost contains a note that says "nice work." Filmed by nobody. Content not suitable for monetization. Remarkably satisfying anyway.

Title: Return Label (No Reason Selected)
Description: Pre-filled. Reason: Other. We're not going to ask. We never were. Just send it back. We'll sort it out. We won't sort it out.

Title: Biodegradable Packaging (Still Here)
Description: Rated to decompose in 90 days. Currently on day 847. Doing fine. Integrated fully into the ecosystem of your garage. Legally compostable.

Title: Q&A Section (Answered by Someone Who Doesn't Own It)
Description: Laminated card printed with 6 product questions and confidently wrong answers from Bamazon customers. Includes one answer that is just "yes."

Title: Bamazon Gift Card (Amount: Thinking About It)
Description: Value TBD. Recipient must wait while giver figures out what feels right. Valid at participating moments of generosity. No expiry except emotionally. Parody physical card — not a Shopify gift card product.
